name: granim
when_to_use: 需要在 canvas 上做流动、可交互、多状态互相过渡的渐变背景(hero/loading/氛围装饰)时用它:new Granim({element, states:{...gradients}})。用于动态流体渐变;要静态低多边形生成艺术用 trianglify。canvas 需给显式像素尺寸;widget 内必须把真实 canvas 元素传给 element(selector 按 document 解析、看不到 shadow)。
why_valuable: 在 canvas 上 60fps 平滑插值多组渐变状态并互相过渡是非平凡的,AI 的 CSS 渐变动画常有色带、卡顿或生硬跳变;granim 用 canvas 2D 逐帧插值把流体渐变做稳,只画进你给的 canvas、无样式注入。

data_in.note: 真实入参是 { element, states: { 'default-state': { gradients } } };本 schema 把高频的 gradients 提到顶层,boot 内包成 states['default-state']。至少 2 组色才会循环过渡;element 接受 selector 或 HTMLCanvasElement。

schema.gradients: string[][] —— 每组是一套渐变色,如 [['#834D9B','#D04ED6'], ['#1CD8D2','#93EDC7']];>=2 组循环过渡

options?.opacity?: number[] —— 每个渐变色的不透明度,默认 [1, 1]
options?.transitionSpeed?: number —— 状态/组间过渡 ms
options?.isPausedWhenNotInView?: boolean —— 离开视口暂停,默认 false
options?.image?: object —— 可选图像混合遮罩(source/blendingMode 等)

spec.note: canvas 需显式像素尺寸;widget 内建议 canvas.width/height 设像素值 + style.width:100%、style.height 固定 px,禁 vh/百分比高。

en.when_to_use: Use it for flowing, interactive canvas gradient backgrounds with transitions between multiple states (hero/loading/ambient decoration): new Granim({element, states:{...gradients}}). Use it for dynamic fluid gradients; for static low-poly generative art, use trianglify. Give the canvas explicit pixel dimensions. Inside a widget, pass the actual canvas element to element because selectors resolve against document and cannot see shadow DOM.
en.why_valuable: Smoothly interpolating multiple gradient states on canvas at 60fps is non-trivial; AI-authored CSS gradient animations often show banding, stutter, or abrupt jumps. granim stabilizes the effect with per-frame Canvas2D interpolation, draws only into the supplied canvas, and injects no styles.

data_in.note: The real input is { element, states: { 'default-state': { gradients } } }. This schema lifts the common gradients field to the top level, and boot wraps it in states['default-state']. At least 2 color sets are needed for a transition loop. element accepts a selector or HTMLCanvasElement.

schema.gradients: string[][] -- each item is one gradient color set, for example [['#834D9B','#D04ED6'], ['#1CD8D2','#93EDC7']]; >=2 sets loop through transitions

options?.opacity?: number[] -- opacity for each gradient color; default [1, 1]
options?.transitionSpeed?: number -- transition time between states/sets in ms
options?.isPausedWhenNotInView?: boolean -- pause outside the viewport; default false
options?.image?: object -- optional image blending mask (source/blendingMode, etc.)

spec.note: The canvas needs explicit pixel dimensions. Inside a widget, set canvas.width/height in pixels plus style.width:100% and a fixed-px style.height. Do not use vh or percentage heights.

example._why: 钉死 gradients 是二维色数组、boot 会包进 states['default-state'];>=2 组才过渡。

uplink: display-only 不上行;onStart/onGradientChange/onEnd 等回调由消费 AI 直接接原生 config。

carriers.widget: supported:渲染进传入的 canvas(务必传 element 而非 selector),无 CSS 注入;window resize 监听全局但有界

isolation.evidence: +esm 仅 default 导出(rt=Granim)。README:new Granim({ element, states:{'default-state':{gradients:[[..],[..]]}}, direction?, opacity?, isPausedWhenNotInView? });element 接受 selector 或 HTMLCanvasElement,走 canvas 2D 绘制。+esm 隔离扫描:document.head=0、createElement('style')=0、insertRule=0、document.body=0;window.addEventListener=2(resize,用于响应式 canvas)且有一处 `window.CustomEvent=` polyfill 赋值(旧浏览器兜底)。注意:element 传字符串按 document 解析,故 shadow 内传真实 canvas 元素。全局足迹仅 resize 监听 + CustomEvent polyfill,无样式/DOM 外泄。
